Home › About

About NuSmile

A team of dedicated dental professionals committed to caring for your smile and your health.

10+ Years of care
Our Story

More than dentists — we genuinely care.

NuSmile Dental Practice was founded on a simple belief: every patient deserves to feel heard, safe, and well looked after. Located at Maroela Mall in Ongwediva, we have been serving the northern Namibia community with dedication and pride.

Our approach balances clinical precision with genuine human warmth. We take time to understand each patient, explain procedures clearly, and ensure no one ever feels rushed or anxious in our chair.

  • ✓Comprehensive general and cosmetic dentistry under one roof
  • ✓State-of-the-art FONA dental equipment for precise, comfortable care
  • ✓A calm, welcoming environment for patients of all ages
  • ✓Fully transparent pricing with no hidden costs
  • ✓Conveniently located at Maroela Mall, Ongwediva
Our Values

What drives everything we do.

Compassion First

We listen before we treat. Understanding your concerns and goals shapes every care decision we make.

Clinical Excellence

Continuous training, modern equipment and rigorous hygiene standards ensure the best possible outcomes.

Honest Transparency

We explain every procedure and cost clearly upfront — no surprises, no pressure, no hidden fees.

Our Team

The people behind your smile.

Experienced professionals who love what they do.

Lead Dentist

Dr. Ndapewa Iipinge

BDS graduate with over a decade of experience in general and cosmetic dentistry. Passionate about patient comfort and precision care.

Dental Specialist

Dr. Asha Hamutenya

Specialising in orthodontics and cosmetic procedures. Dedicated to transforming smiles with a gentle, reassuring approach.

Dental Therapist

Ms. Lucia Nakashona

Certified dental therapist specialising in preventive care and patient education, with a warm and welcoming chair-side manner.

Come and meet the team.

We would love to see you. Book a visit and experience the NuSmile difference.

Home › Services

Our Services

Comprehensive dental care for every stage of life, delivered with expertise and genuine warmth.

Full-Spectrum Care

Everything your smile needs, under one roof.

Whether you need a routine checkup or a complete smile transformation, our experienced team has the skills and equipment to deliver outstanding results.

01

General Dentistry

Routine checkups, professional cleanings, fillings and preventive care to maintain a strong, healthy smile all year round.

Book now →
02

Teeth Whitening

Professional-grade in-chair whitening that safely brightens your smile by several shades in a single session.

Book now →
03

Braces & Orthodontics

Traditional metal braces and modern clear aligners to correct crowding and misalignment for a perfectly straight smile.

Book now →
04

Dental Implants

Permanent, natural-looking tooth replacements anchored into the jawbone, fully restoring chewing function and confidence.

Book now →
05

Children's Dentistry

Gentle, reassuring dental care designed for children — building healthy habits and positive experiences from an early age.

Book now →
06

Deep Cleaning

Thorough scaling and root planing to remove hardened tartar from beneath the gumline and protect against gum disease.

Book now →
07

Cosmetic Dentistry

Porcelain veneers, composite bonding and full smile makeovers, individually crafted for a beautiful, natural-looking result.

Book now →
08

Root Canal Therapy

Pain-relieving treatment to save an infected tooth, carried out with modern techniques for maximum patient comfort.

Book now →
09

Extractions

Safe, comfortable removal of severely damaged or wisdom teeth, performed with care to minimise discomfort and recovery time.

Book now →
Common Questions

Frequently asked questions.

We recommend a checkup and professional cleaning every six months. Regular visits allow us to catch small problems before they become larger, more costly ones.
Yes. Our professional whitening systems are clinically tested and applied under controlled conditions, making them significantly safer and more effective than over-the-counter alternatives.
We recommend a child's first dental visit when their first tooth appears, or no later than their first birthday. Early visits establish good habits and let us monitor development.
With proper care, dental implants can last a lifetime. The titanium post integrates with your jawbone, providing a stable, long-lasting foundation for the replacement crown.
Absolutely. We have extensive experience with dental anxiety and take great care to explain each step, work at your pace, and ensure you feel safe and comfortable throughout.

Not sure which service you need?

Book a consultation and our dentist will recommend the right treatment plan for you.
